abelian_record.conclusion: coefficient records that commute never pass the physical-current gate
abelian_record.induced_action_on_abelian_algebra: nontrivial, hence not inner: Int of an abelian algebra is trivial
abelian_record.model: K(f) = i*diag(f) on C^12 with permutation implementers

equivariance.per_axis_rescaling: breaks K(g.f) = Pi(g) K(f) Pi(g)* on any element moving the rescaled axis
equivariance.per_axis_sign_flip: breaks the common odd-response sign and covariance

rank_deficient.conclusion: degenerate response scales cannot produce the twelve-dimensional physical current

typing.firewall: a measured-coupling target in the source manifest fails closed
typing.phantom_measurement: claiming measured status without a pinned, existing, hash-matching artifact fails closed
typing.relabeling_conflation: a response contract not typed distinct from register relabeling fails closed
typing.repair_conflation: an irreversible strict-descent repair declared as a current source fails closed
